name: Delivery Note Company Wise Report
query:
SELECT
    DN.name as "DELIVERY NOTE NO:Link/Delivery Note:120",
    DN.posting_date as "DELIVERY NOTE DATE:Date:70",
    DN.company as "Company:Link/Company:120",
    DN.customer as "CUSTOMER:Link/Customer:120",
    DN.customer_name as "CUSTOMER NAME",
    DN.purpose as "PURPOSE",
    DNO.item_code as "ITEM CODE:Link/Item:120",
    DNO.description as "DESCRIPTION",
    (select c.sales_person from `tabCustomer` c where c.name = DN.customer) as "SALES PERSON:Link/Sales Person",
    ifnull(DNO.qty, 0) as "DELIVERY NOTE QTY:Float:100",
    DN.status as "DELIVERY NOTE STATUS",
    (select SO.name from `tabSales Order` as SO where SO.customer = DN.customer and SO.delivery_note = DN.name and SO.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1) as "SALES ORDER NO:Link/Sales Order:120",
    (select SO.transaction_date from `tabSales Order` as SO where SO.customer = DN.customer and SO.delivery_note = DN.name and SO.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1) as "SALES ORDER DATE:Date:70",
    (select GROUP_CONCAT(SOI.qty, 0) from `tabSales Order` as SO
     inner join `tabSales Order Item` as SOI on SO.name = SOI.parent
     where SOI.item_code = DNO.item_code and SO.customer = DN.customer and SO.delivery_note = DN.name and SO.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1) as "SALES ORDER QTY:Float:100",
    
    (select GROUP_CONCAT(SI.name) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI where  SI.customer = DN.customer and DN.name = SI.delivery_note and SI.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1) as "INVOICE NO:Link/Sales Invoice:120",
    (select GROUP_CONCAT(SI.posting_date) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI where  SI.customer = DN.customer and  DN.name = SI.delivery_note and SI.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1) as "INVOICE DATE",
    
    (select ifnull(sum(SII.qty), 0) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI
     inner join `tabSales Invoice Item` as SII on SI.name = SII.parent
     where SII.item_code = DNO.item_code and SI.customer = DN.customer and SI.delivery_note = DN.name and SI.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1) as "INVOICE QTY",
    CASE
        WHEN DN.status = 'Cancelled' THEN 0
        WHEN DN.status = 'Return Issued' THEN 0
        ELSE (
            (select IFNULL(DNO.qty, 0) + IFNULL(SUM(DNO1.qty), 0)
             from `tabDelivery Note` DN1
             inner join `tabDelivery Note Item` AS DNO1 ON DN1.name = DNO1.parent
             where DN1.docstatus = 1 and DN1.is_return = 1 and DNO1.item_code = DNO.item_code and DN1.customer = DN.customer and DN.name = DN1.return_against
            ) - IFNULL(
                (select ifnull(sum(SII.qty), 0) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI
                 inner join `tabSales Invoice Item` as SII on SI.name = SII.parent
                 where SII.item_code = DNO.item_code and SI.customer = DN.customer and SI.delivery_note = DN.name and SI.docstatus = 1 and DN.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1), 0
            )
        )
    END as "PENDING QTY:Data:100",
    DNO.incoming_rate as "INCOMING RATE:Currency:100",
    (select SRI.valuation_rate from `tabStock Reconciliation` SR inner join `tabStock Reconciliation Item` as SRI on SR.name = SRI.parent where SRI.item_code = DNO.item_code and SR.docstatus = 1 and SR.company = DN.company and SR.company = %(company)s LIMIT 1) as "Valuation Rate:Currency:100",
    CASE
        WHEN (
            CASE
                WHEN DN.status = 'Cancelled' THEN 0
                WHEN DN.status = 'Return Issued' THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (select IFNULL(DNO.qty, 0) + IFNULL(SUM(DNO1.qty), 0)
                     from `tabDelivery Note` DN1
                     inner join `tabDelivery Note Item` AS DNO1 ON DN1.name = DNO1.parent
                     where DN1.docstatus = 1 and DN1.is_return = 1 and DNO1.item_code = DNO.item_code and DN1.customer = DN.customer and DN.name = DN1.return_against
                    ) - IFNULL(
                        (select ifnull(sum(SII.qty), 0) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI
                         inner join `tabSales Invoice Item` as SII on SI.name = SII.parent
                         where SII.item_code = DNO.item_code and SI.customer = DN.customer and SI.delivery_note = DN.name and SI.docstatus = 1 and DN.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1), 0
                    )
                )
            END
        ) = 0 THEN 'Completed'
        WHEN (
            CASE
                WHEN DN.status = 'Cancelled' THEN 0
                WHEN DN.status = 'Return Issued' THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (select IFNULL(DNO.qty, 0) + IFNULL(SUM(DNO1.qty), 0)
                     from `tabDelivery Note` DN1
                     inner join `tabDelivery Note Item` AS DNO1 ON DN1.name = DNO1.parent
                     where DN1.docstatus = 1 and DN1.is_return = 1 and DNO1.item_code = DNO.item_code and DN1.customer = DN.customer and DN.name = DN1.return_against
                    ) - IFNULL(
                        (select ifnull(sum(SII.qty), 0) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI
                         inner join `tabSales Invoice Item` as SII on SI.name = SII.parent
                         where SII.item_code = DNO.item_code and SI.customer = DN.customer and SI.delivery_note = DN.name and SI.docstatus = 1 and DN.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1), 0
                    )
                )
            END
        ) < 0 THEN 'Returned'
        ELSE 'Pending'
    END as "STATUS"
FROM
    `tabDelivery Note` DN
    inner join  `tabDelivery Note Item` as DNO on DN.name = DNO.parent
    inner join  `tabSales Team` as DSO on DN.name = DSO.parent
WHERE
    DN.docstatus = 1 and DN.is_return = 0 and (DATE(DN.`posting_date`) between %(from_date)s and %(to_date)s) and DN.company = %(company)s AND (DN.status = %(status)s OR %(status)s = 'ALL')
    ORDER BY DN.name;
